name: browser-mcp
description: MCP server + Chrome extension to automate your real browser with AI (TypeScript)

scripts.build: npm run build -w @browser-mcp/shared && npm run build -w @browser-mcp/mcp && npm run build -w @browser-mcp/extension
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @browser-mcp/shared && npm run typecheck -w @browser-mcp/mcp && npm run typecheck -w @browser-mcp/extension
scripts.test: npm run test -w @browser-mcp/shared && npm run test -w @browser-mcp/mcp

author: poqdev
